coverage_groups.name: basic_fetch_flow
coverage_groups.description: Cover the complete fetch pipeline: request→accept→data→decode
coverage_groups.constraint: each FSM state (idle, req_sent, wait_data, pending_ready) must be entered and exited

coverage_groups.name: branch_handling
coverage_groups.description: Cover branch redirect: target PC update, privilege capture, squash_decode, FSM reset
coverage_groups.constraint: branch while idle, while pending_ready, with privilege change

coverage_groups.name: flush_invalidate
coverage_groups.description: Cover invalidate path: icache_flush, icache_invalidate, FSM reset
coverage_groups.constraint: invalidate while idle, invalidate while waiting for data

coverage_groups.name: error_handling
coverage_groups.description: Cover icache error and page fault responses
coverage_groups.constraint: error, page fault, and accept on fault (PC should not advance)

coverage_groups.name: stall_behavior
coverage_groups.description: Cover decode stall: pending_ready persists when decode not ready
coverage_groups.constraint: fetch_accept_i=0 must hold instruction in pending_ready

coverage_groups.name: concurrent_events
coverage_groups.description: Cover icache accept+valid same cycle for back-to-back throughput
coverage_groups.constraint: icache_accept_i and icache_valid_i both high in same cycle

coverage_model.fsm_state_coverage: all 3 FSM states (req_sent, wait_data, pending_ready) must be entered
coverage_model.fsm_transition_coverage: all legal transitions between states must be exercised
coverage_model.output_signal_coverage: every output port must be toggled (fetch_valid, fetch_instr, fetch_pc, fetch_fault_*, icache_*, squash_decode)
coverage_model.priority_coverage: priority ordering: invalidate > branch > icache_data > output > new_request
